subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down unto all who dwell within the realm of possibility, calling all unto the Most Exalted Horizon - that Station from which hath shone forth the Sun of the Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان و یدع الکل الی الافق الاعلی هذا المقام الذی منه اشرقت شمس الظهور
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
